message:
chore(ft-xbnl0.2.3): silence dead-code warning on legacy return_client (tick 307)

Adds `#[allow(dead_code)]` to `MuxPool::return_client` (mux_pool.rs
L288) with a doc comment explaining why it's retained:

- Legacy ambient path preserved alongside cx-first sibling
  `return_client_with_cx` (immediately below in the same impl)
- Current production MuxPool ops route through the cx-first path;
  this ambient version is kept for any future ambient caller under
  the legacy-path-preserved contract.

Reduces baseline warning count 3 → 2.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 121 (187-307).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 68 (unchanged).
main.rs cross-crate total: 236 sites (unchanged).

Grand total: 304 cx-first migrations (unchanged; warning cleanup only).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
